reasoning: Your lactate clearance is the main limiter. The last ride shows you've had an extended rest, so we'll start controlled but focus on building fatigue resistance essential for the Alpine Loop climb. Tackling Emigration Canyon with structured over-unders will enhance your aerobic base and improve that crucial 9.3% power drop-off.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternate 3 min at 218W (92% FTP), 2 min at 248W (104% FTP). Execute 5 rounds with minimal recovery.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
